name: Vanishing Wayfinder
description:
A vanishing wayfinder is crafted of ivory chased with gold and silver. It has the usual functions of a Wayfinder and the following additional activation.

Activate (2 Actions) command, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You turn the wayfinder in a circle while invoking its command word, gaining the effects of a 2nd-rank Invisibility spell for 5 minutes.
